title: Operational Need Definition
description: Define the persistent stratospheric connectivity and sensing operational need that HAPS-SE addresses

title: Mission Context Definition
description: Establish the mission context including target altitude band 18–22 km station-keeping and endurance requirements

title: Stakeholder Needs Capture
description: Capture stakeholder needs for communications EO and ISR payload capability endurance station-keeping and regulatory compliance

title: Constraint Identification
description: Identify top-level constraints including ICAO airspace gap ITU spectrum and solar energy availability
